title: Customer Portals/Item specific portals
excerpt: Hello.  I was wondering if any sort of item/customer portal is on the roadmap.

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello. I was wondering if any sort of item/customer portal is on the roadmap.

posts.author: MASO (Markus @ Gorilla Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @liambailey

We are in the making of an app that lets you build Client Portals from within monday: Client Portal for monday.com · Gorilla Apps (Feel free to sign up to the waitlist at the very bottom)

The app is currently under review by the marketplace team and is expected to be released quite soon in a first version.

– Markus

posts.author: Mindflows_Jesuena (Jesuena Estoque Reimer)
posts.cookedHtml:
@liambailey Softr recently added Monday.com as a data source and we’ve been able to build multiple client and employee portals and they work very well!
If you want to see the portals we created through Softr in action, please feel free to contact us at Mindflows. We’re a certified Monday.com and Softr partner.

posts.author: xatxat (Simon Kusterer @ Gorilla Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all,

just wanted to let you know that we released Client Portal Builder in the monday marketplace. With the app, you can create and manage Client Portals directly from monday.com. There are different strategies available on how to define which client gets to see which monday board items. The data is stored on your monday account and you can make the portal available on your own domain.

Check it out here.

– Simon
